$comment: Greptile PR review config — copy to .greptile/config.json at repo root. Docs: https://docs.greptile.com
$comment_confidence_threshold: 1 = flag everything (noisy). 2 = balanced, recommended default. 3 = only high-confidence findings.
$comment_comment_types: Restrict to the categories Claude Code Action and CodeRabbit don't already own on this repo — see rules.md header for the split.
